title: Nursery Rhyme. CXC. Riddles.
content:
Made in London,
        Sold at York,
        Stops a bottle
        And is a cork.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. CXC. Riddles.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
